testCaseName: Layered architecture should respect dependency rules
name: Layered architecture should respect dependency rules

statusDetails.message:
Architecture Violation [Priority: MEDIUM] - Rule 'Layered architecture considering all dependencies, consisting of
layer 'Domain' ('com.portfolio.assetmanagement.domain..')
layer 'Application' ('com.portfolio.assetmanagement.application..')
layer 'Infrastructure' ('com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure..')
layer 'Interfaces' ('com.portfolio.assetmanagement.interfaces..')
layer 'Security' ('com.portfolio.assetmanagement.security..')
layer 'Shared' ('com.portfolio.assetmanagement.shared..')
where layer 'Domain' may not access any layer
where layer 'Application' may only access layers ['Domain', 'Shared']
where layer 'Infrastructure' may only access layers ['Domain', 'Shared']
where layer 'Interfaces' may only access layers ['Application', 'Security', 'Shared']
where layer 'Security' may only access layers ['Application', 'Domain', 'Shared']' was violated (3703 times):
